DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Generate numeric Id only for input rows that omit Id and are being created.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Generate next numeric Id from existing instances for a new row when no external Id exists.

DocumentationFact.Name: CommandText
DocumentationFact.Value: meta instance relationship set Measure 1 --to Cube 2
Subcommands: rename-model - Rename the model contract and instance root element.
Subcommands: rename-entity - Atomically rename an entity and follow implied relationship field names.
Subcommands: drop-entity - Remove an entity (must be empty).
Subcommands: add-property - Add a property to an entity.
Subcommands: set-property-required - Change whether a property is required and backfill existing rows when needed.
Subcommands: rename-relationship - Rename a relationship usage by setting or clearing its role.
Subcommands: suggest - Read-only key/reference inference from model + instance data.

DocumentationFact.Name: CommandText
DocumentationFact.Value: meta model add-property Cube Purpose --required true --default-value Unknown

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Input directory containing generated SQL scripts.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable name that contains the target SQL Server connection string.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional database to create/use before deployment.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: C# only. Emit optional tooling helpers in <Model>.Tooling.cs.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required for sql; optional for csv (mutually exclusive with --workspace).

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Use existing workspace for csv import.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Backfill existing rows (required for required properties when entity already has rows).

DocumentationFact.Name: CommandText
DocumentationFact.Value: meta model add-property Cube Purpose --required true --default-value Unknown

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Backfill existing missing/blank rows when switching to required; only valid with --required true.

DocumentationFact.Name: CommandText
DocumentationFact.Value: meta model set-property-required Cube Purpose --required true --default-value Unknown

DocumentationFact.Name: CommandText
DocumentationFact.Value: meta model set-property-required Cube Purpose --required false

DocumentationFact.Name: CommandText
DocumentationFact.Value: meta model rename-property Cube Purpose Description

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Set a new relationship role (usage column becomes <Role>Id). Omit --role to clear the role and revert usage naming to <TargetEntity>Id.

DocumentationFact.Name: CommandText
DocumentationFact.Value: meta model rename-relationship System SystemType --role PrimarySystemType

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required when source entity already has rows; must exist in target entity.

DocumentationFact.Name: CommandText
DocumentationFact.Value: meta model refactor property-to-relationship --source Order.WarehouseId --target Warehouse --lookup Id

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required source scalar property to rewrite.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required lookup key property on target entity.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Keep the source scalar property. This is only valid when the source property name does not collide with the implied relationship usage name.

DocumentationFact.Name: CommandText
DocumentationFact.Value: meta model refactor property-to-relationship --source Order.WarehouseId --target Warehouse --lookup Id

DocumentationFact.Name: CommandText
DocumentationFact.Value: meta model refactor property-to-relationship --source Order.ProductId --target Product --lookup Id --role ProductRef --preserve-property

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required source entity that owns the relationship.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required target entity referenced by the relationship.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional relationship role when multiple edges target the same entity.

DocumentationFact.Name: CommandText
DocumentationFact.Value: meta model refactor relationship-to-property --source Order --target Warehouse

DocumentationFact.Name: CommandText
DocumentationFact.Value: meta model refactor relationship-to-property --source Order --target Product --role ProductRef --property ProductId

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Print copy/paste refactor commands for eligible relationship suggestions.
